nasb.text: and they came and appealed to them, and when they had brought them out, they kept begging them to leave the city.

esv.text: So they came and apologized to them. And they took them out and asked them to leave the city.

cnv.text: 於是來請求他們，領他們出監之後，就請他們離開那城。

ccb.text: 连忙到狱中向他们道歉，领他们出监，又央求他们离开腓立比。

csbs.text: 于是来安抚他们，并且把他们领出来，请求他们离开那城。
